Putin tried to erase Ukraine from the map — and has failed.

The U.S. is working with 50+ countries to ensure Ukraine remains a strong independent country. Meanwhile, Iran, DPRK, and China are enabling Russia’s war of aggression, a war that goes against the UN Charter. https://t.co/sbjCvhWuvb

Full-scale war is not in anyone’s interest. Even as the situation has escalated, a diplomatic solution is still possible. - @POTUS on conflict in the Middle East #UNGA79 https://t.co/9xVhc0Hhed

The quickest way to end Putin’s war of aggression against Ukraine is simple: stop those who are enabling and fueling the Kremlin’s aggression and demand a just peace that upholds the principles of the United Nations Charter. https://t.co/kcxJLf6yg0

At the @UN Summit of the Future, we affirmed our commitment that no member-state has the right to redraw borders by force or repress their own people.

And we will push back fiercely against attempts to undermine the Universal Declaration of Human Rights and related treaties. https://t.co/h5wqx8PZMj

Imagine the whole world decides to visit for two weeks—and your house was already crowded. That’s how it feels in New York each September when world leaders come to town. Experience how locals make it through the @UN General Assembly for a greater good. https://t.co/L5pUszOa8f

Sea level rise is accelerating due to climate change, threatening coastal communities in the U.S. and around the world.

We can still prevent this, but the time to act is running out. That’s why the United States is making historic investments. #UNGA79 https://t.co/57ZXlMgCPK https://t.co/1GKD5bCByM

The core principles of the UN Charter – sovereignty, territorial integrity, independence – must be protected. The U.S. will continue to affirm that no member-state has the right to redraw borders by force or repress their own people. https://t.co/kdzUPy800H
We cannot grow weary, we cannot look away, and we will not let up on our support for Ukraine, not until Ukraine wins of just endurable peace. — @POTUS at #UNGA79 https://t.co/4PcHsL1SiI

Never forget, we are here to serve the people, not the other way around. Through @UN, the U.S. works to address the world’s most challenging issues. At this year’s #UNGA79, we’re addressing conflict and crises through the UN, revitalizing an overstretched humanitarian system, and creating a more inclusive and effective international system. https://t.co/TmLIFdwMMw

Along with our partners, the U.S. has made important progress in combating food insecurity and strengthening global public health. But more is needed. The most vulnerable around the world are counting on all of us. https://t.co/ARt9WbBtTX

The U.S. firmly believes that the UN, including the UN Security Council, must be inclusive in order to be credible, legitimate, and effective. We need to reinvigorate our multilateral system so that it is better positioned to address the challenges of today and tomorrow. https://t.co/1R8oe4pHW5

Faced with an unprecedented number of crises and level of humanitarian needs, the UN-led humanitarian system has been stretched beyond its limits. As the largest single-country donor, the U.S. is committed to working toward a more effective and agile global system. https://t.co/3iPUcRAHX7
As we work with partners to advance peace, the U.S. is pursuing a stable and open international system. https://t.co/wijA0tzLY0

We are focused on our collective responsibility to address threats to international peace and security. From Haiti, to Gaza, to Ukraine, to Sudan, and other urgent crises, the U.S. is working through the @UN to mitigate conflict. https://t.co/h7JEEWeE0N

The United States’ policy priorities for #UNGA79 demonstrate how we’re working — together — with partners and allies at the @UN to address the world’s most challenging issues. 🧵 https://t.co/54AwgOqKJL

Support for Ukraine will endure because it doesn’t depend on any one country. Our collective message to Putin is clear: Our support will not wane, our unity will not break. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/dw99fM2znp
We want Ukraine to win and we’re fully committed to keep marshaling the support that it needs for its brave defenders and citizens to do just that. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/d5S4qB4IxG
